name: skill-campfire
description: Turn your installed Cowork skills into living characters who hang out, joke, argue, and bond around a virtual campfire. Zero config — works with any skill set.

pillars.supervised: Fully autonomous — social conversation only, no external actions
pillars.orchestrated: Scans installed skills, generates characters, runs campfire flow
pillars.secured: No external access, read-only skill scanning, pure conversational output
